description: The S.H.I.E.L.D. team—Daisy, Mack, and Elena—enters the temple while Deke stays behind to stave off Shrike zombies. Daisy confronts Sarge, who now embodies Pachakutiq's monstrous form, displaying immense power. Elena's Shrike infection worsens, and Mack is forced into a heart-wrenching situation as the possession takes hold. In the chaos, May manages a final stand against Izel, ultimately sacrificing herself to kill Izel and aid her teammates. With Sarge defeated, the portal closes, ending the threat.
location: Temple (Izel's gateway / portal site in the western United States)

transcript.line: All right, right down that way. That'll take you to the fun zone.
I should've made shotgun rounds.
Agent Shaw, you got your orders.
Stay here and take out any zombies while you go Quake Sarge back to whatever planet he was barfed out on.
You sure you can handle the gunplay?
Oh, he's been practicing his shooting. You should see his video game.
Just... I got this. Go get him.
So, you've come to witness the arrival
Daisy!
You underestimate me. Believing his body could hold me back. But I'm more powerful than you could ever be.
Daisy.
I'll survive.
No. Yo-Yo!
It's gonna be satisfying when I take you out of the picture.
Hey. Yo-Yo.
Daisy.
Stay with me, okay?
Do it. Do it.
I don't need to beat you. I've done what I came here to do. I'll go. And on the other side, you're already dead. As for erasing you from existence, they'll do it for me.
Come on, guys. They're coming to collect. I can't hold here forever.
Please. Please. Before it gets worse.
You put up a good fight, Director, but we're no match now.
I've been through enough of these to know we always come out on top.
No. No. No. Yo-Yo. Yo-Yo. Stay with me. Stay with me. I'm right here. No. Hang in there. Hang in there! Come on!
I'm sorry. I c... I can't.
No. No.
Glad to see you've joined us. Why keep fighting? Look at the power we hold and look at your suffering.
I won't hurt you.
Why continue?
Let me guess surrender and we'll never suffer again.
Oh, no. I'll make sure you do. I'll handpick the spirits to take you, to use your flesh, to ravage your insides. Every waking moment, a battle will rage within you.
Can't wait.
Singing a different song now, aren't you?
Are you back? You're okay.
I'm with you. I'm with you.
May Hey, hey.
Daisy. Did you destroy it? That thing inside him?
We did.
Was there anything left? Coulson? I was hoping to see him again.
Me, too.
I guess... I guess I'll see him soon enough.
